backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.0 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target JDK 21 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with Spring Boot 3.x.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update gmavenplus-plugin to 3.0.2 for compatibility with newer Groovy and Maven versions.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may fail to compile Groovy code or integrate with Maven 3.8+/Spring Boot 3.x toolchains.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-surefire-plugin to 3.3.0 for better test execution support in modern environments.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may have issues running tests on JDK 21 or with newer Spring Boot test contexts.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Groovy dependencies to 4.0.21 to ensure compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Groovy 4.0.8 may not fully support Java 21 language features or bytecode generation required by the new JDK.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Groovy-all dependency to 4.0.21 to match the core Groovy version.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Version mismatch between groovy and groovy-all can cause runtime linkage errors.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit H2 database version to rely on Spring Boot's managed version.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Explicitly defining an old H2 version (1.4.200) causes conflicts with Spring Boot 3's managed dependencies and may lead to runtime errors.
